entry.title: Re: How to avoid empty drafts in RAP?
entry.content:
Hi @junwu ,

Thank you for this suggestion ! This option definitely looks interesting and to be honest, I was not aware of it till now 🙂 But after the review and careful analysis, it seems to me that it will not suit my requirement. This option allows to automate a new instance of the BO with some default values. But my requirement is how to avoid creating a draft, when the user did not fill any values in the UI at all. To sum up: I do not want to fill any pre-defined / default values for a BO during creation and I do not even want to save the draft if the user did not fill at least one field in UI.

Regards,

Bohdan

entry.title: Outdated/useless documentation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to get some information but unfortunately the official documentation on the help portal is outdated and therefore useless.

Is there a plan to update it or another documentation we can count on to get some help?

documentation in question: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps?locale=en-US

entry.title: SAC story page filter default selection with Button Script
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a scenario for one our story where we would like to filter only on Version with Property ( Start_Period) which has date values in it.

Example: Version Dimension

 

 

 

We have story which we need to display with the only column with:

 

 

We are trying to fix story filter with Date and Version Property (Start_Period) and getting an error while running the button with the below script.

var selections = Table_1.getDataSource().getDataSelections();
var member = PlanningModel_1.getMember("Version",selections[0]["Version"]);
var prop = member.properties;
var planning = Table_1.getPlanning();
var SM1 = prop["Start_Period"];
var dateparam = "[Date].[FYP].&[" +SM1+ "]";

 

//Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Date","[Date].[FYP].&[202401]");
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Date",dateparam);

 

There are no errors in script, however when we run Button it throws an error as below:

 

Please advise.

Regards,

Ram

entry.title: How to Mass Import Worker Data for Concurrent Employment?
entry.content:
I need to create a lot of employee and some employes has Concurrent Employment, but I do not found a template that have the field "employement situation" to insert the option "Concurrent Employment" in app F6097 - Manage Wokforce. 

When I use the template "Templ_WorkAgreement_Semicolon" and try insert more than one cost center for the one employe the system show the error: "The dates for the Job Details entity shouldn't overlap"

Is it possible to mass import tWorker Data for Concurrent Employment?

entry.title: Driving Efficiency and Growth with an SAP Business Network Supplier Account
entry.content:
There is more technology available today than ever before in history. Technology is growing at an exponential rate, and businesses are forced to keep up or get left behind in the fiercely competitive global economy. What’s important not to forget amidst the buzz and excitement around some of the current technology trends in business (you know what I’m talking about) is the fundamental digital elements that help businesses bring out their best. In a hyper-connected and interdependent ecosystem, no business does business alone. Therefore, it is crucial that businesses have the technology in place to be able to collaborate efficiently and effectively with other businesses. 

Read our supplier’s insightful perspective on change in business. 

What is SAP Business Network? 

SAP Business Network modernizes how procurement and supply chain processes are connected across companies. It closes the break point between buyers and suppliers by enabling document collaboration with configurable business rules, data sharing, and trading partner search and discovery. This helps companies gain greater visibility into their supply chain, increase operational efficiency, and ensure compliance. 

What is an SAP Business Network supplier account? 

To join and access SAP Business Network, organizations looking to sell can sign up for a standard account for free. This account enables suppliers to 

  • digitally exchange documents and collaborate with their customers, 
  • get discovered by new customers, 
  • receive leads and participate in sourcing events, 
  • have greater visibility into their transactions, 
  • optimize their business for compliance with customer requirements, 
  • manage their accounts,  
  • and customize their experience. 

Who should use a standard account? 

Any organization can sign up in just a few minutes for an account and begin using it. It is an excellent resource to expand your global reach, especially for suppliers who are looking for business opportunities to grow their business and get discovered by new customers to develop business relationships. 

Size:  

The standard account is ideal for companies of all sizes, ranging from small to medium-sized businesses (SMB) all the way to large enterprises.  

Industries:  

SAP Business Network spans many industries, including but not limited to products and services in the following industries: 

  • Manufacturing 
  • Professional Services 
  • Retail 
  • Finance & Insurance 
  • Construction 
  • Medical 
  • Construction & Maintenance Services 
  • Computer Hardware, Software & Telecom 
  • And many others 

Why use an SAP Business Network supplier account / standard account? 

A supplier account on SAP Business Network truly has all the features you need to successfully collaborate with your customers and grow your business. 

Business Outcome 

Feature 

Streamline business processes 

  • Digitize transactions and reduce errors with e-invoicing and electronic order management for an unlimited number of documents 
  • Manage multiple customers in one place 

Enhance customer collaboration 

  • Message customers about documents; messages are then automatically embedded in the document 
  • Receive critical updates from customers through buyer announcements 

Improve visibility over key business insights 

  • Easy access to important information, such as document and payment status and key performance indicators (KPI) analytics in one place 

Optimize for compliance with customer requirements 

  • Automatically validate orders and invoices (based on buyer-configured rules) 
  • Demonstrate compliance with legal and customer requirements with the standardized human rights self-assessment 

Customizable user experience 

  • Customize the tools available based on your business needs with account management features  
  • Customizable homepage 
  • Access to SAP Business Network Supplier mobile app to keep up with orders on-the-go 

Greater discoverability 

  • Suppliers can get discovered by interested buyers with a searchable company profile that includes sustainability ratings and certifications, product keywords, and operational locations 

More business opportunities 

  • Grow your business and build long-term customer relationships in a thriving global network of trading partners by participating in sourcing events and receiving new leads from SAP Business Network Discovery postings 

 

If you are not a member of SAP Business Network already, sign up today for a world of possibilities for your business!

entry.title: Re: Unable Transfer Deletion Flag from S4 to GTS
entry.content:
Hi Aditya ,

As mentioned by Benjamin deletion indicator of feeder system material is updated in GTS using change pointer and it sets the valid to as current date .

Deletion indicator indicator shown in GTS product master is updated when products are flagged for Archiving using the /SAPSLL/PRODUCT_ARCHIVE_CHECK 

Regards

Lijo S

entry.title: SAC - Signflip in Calculation of Previous Years Values
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we have a problem in SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling with the Signflip of EXP-Accounts. 

Situation

We have an Account-Dimension with a Sign-Flip-Property, which should enable different signs for the EXP-Accounts (Sign Flip for Base Amount shows the Costs as a positive value / Sign Flip for Management shows Costs as a negative Amount). 

This works well, as decribed in the Documentation (SAP Help Portal). Also for the Calculation (Row 3 - Calculation of "Direct Margin = Revenue - Direct Cost of Sales") it works fine, after setting the right Priorities for the Calculation. Exmaple see Screenshot below. 

Problem

We need to calculate the Previous Year Values. But here the Signflip "destroys" the calculation when it comes to the time navigation. 

The first 2 Columns (green) are correct ans also the result (Direct Margin) is calculated correctly.

  • LC (no Signflip) shows always positive Values
  • LC shows Cost as negative Values

In the last Column (red) we can see the problem for the previous Year Calculation:

  • LC - (PY) does show the Cost as negative value, but the calculation of Direct Margin is wrong (it adds the 2 Accounts above). I would expect 2,960k - 2,178k = 782k as a direct margin. Like in the middle column for LC. 

Background

New Model Type, optimized Story. 

LC (no Signflip) - is the Measure in the Import-Model. 

LC - is a calculated Measure to reflect the signflip:

 

LC - (PY) - is a calculated measure to get the previous year value from LC (only Actuals):

 

It would be great if someone can help here! 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Program not available in Advance Financial Close
entry.content:
Hi Darrel,
Thanks for your reply, I have checked my task model the program is not available but it's available in GUI all config is intact. 
So I was wondering how it's not in the task model list in AFC and all sync is in place.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to avoid empty drafts in RAP?
entry.content: i think you can use action for your case.

entry.title: How to check the settlement rules for WBS elements?
entry.content:
Could you please advise any reports / apps that we can use to display the settlement rules for WBS Elements?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check the settlement rules for WBS elements?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


You can use below app to display settlement rules defined for existing projects/WBS Elements:

Manage Settlement Rules – Projects


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: How to restrict the access to truly display for some applications?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We have a role containing tile 'My Purchase Requisitions' and other containing tile 'Display Purchase requisitions'.

When we assign both the roles to a user, user is able to edit all the purchase requisitions. Is there a way, we can restrict the access to truly display with both roles assigned to a single user?

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the access to truly display for some...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

In order to provide display access for both applications, you can restrict the Business Roles with "Write Access: No Access".

 

The authorization concept for business roles is based on the concept of granting authorizations (as opposed to denying them). By adding business catalogs to a business role and assigning the business role to a business user, you can control which applications the business user is authorized to carry out. As a next step, you define how the customer data can be accessed.

In the Maintain Restrictions UI, you can maintain restrictions for business roles. These restrictions are the basis of authorizations that are granted to the business users who are assigned to this business role. The business catalog defines which access categories are available for maintaining and for which fields restriction values can be maintained.

The following access categories are available:
  • Write, Read, Value Help (write access)
  • Read, Value Help (read access)
  • Value Help (value help access)

If you set the "Write, read, value help" to "No access", this means that the role will be read only and therefore, the users will not be able to edit any data.

 

For more information, please check SAP Help Portal | How to Define Authorizations Based on Restrictions

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
My submission for task 5.

I exposed the plain service using both REST and OData protocols and compared the service documents (I also added an entity). As a result, the service documents looked similar, except that the OData document had "@odata.context" and "@odata.metadataEtag" fields. Additionally, the names of the arrays containing the entities were different: "entites" for REST and "value" for OData.

REST

OData

entry.title: Positive Pay Output File Format
entry.content:
Hello,

Customer uses a positive pay file in CSV and sends this to the bank. In SAP, the standard format is US_POSIPAY which is a TXT file format.

Is there any way to change the file format to produce a CSV format in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud 2402

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: R47 Delete ABAP Session after Error
entry.content:
Hi Raquel

This was for particular user - SAPSYS. Almost the above error message is for all WP. Attached Screenshot of SM21 and wp trace.

dev_wp error message : 

*** WARNING => ThResFreeSession: free resources of T208_U1004_M0 (normal mode, complete free), rc=ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG, db_action=TH_DB_ROLLBACK [thxxmode.c 888]
***LOG R47=> ThResFreeSession, delete (ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG) [thxxmode.c 1172]
ThResFreeSession: delete T208_U1004_M0.

entry.title: How to adjust the field's names of cost components?
entry.content:
We would like to know how to adjust the descriptions of the fields related to cost components in Cost Estimates reports (e.g. Direct Material, Machine Time...).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to adjust the field's names of cost components?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


The names shown in Cost Estimates reports for the cost components are the ones defined in Configuration Activity / SSCUI 102427 - Define Cost Component Structure. You can also refer to the SAP Help Portal documentation below:

Cost Components


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: In MD07 traffic siginal, What is definition of 1st Re...
entry.content:
It is number of days the available stock can satisfy the demand qty .

Stock Day’s supply Calculation = On Hand Stock - Demand

1st Receipt Day’s Supply : On hand Stock + Open PO - Demand

2nd Receipt day’s supply  : On hand stock + Open PO + Firmed Purchase requisition – Demand

We can include any receipt type in customization for calculation of 1st RDS & 2nd RDS.

entry.title: Re: Procedure cached plans not reused for new connection
entry.content:
Some assumptions:

  • a new connection/spid always sees the first invocation of the proc taking 15 seconds; all subsequent calls (by the same spid) always run fast (~300 ms)
  • after the 15-second initial proc call, a query of monCachedProcedures shows the PlanID and CompileDate change and the ExecutionCount is reset to 0; (if there are multiple rows in monCachedProcedures for this proc then I would expect only one of these rows to see said changes after a 15-second proc call)
  • once you get past the 15-second initial proc call (ie, all follow-on proc calls are fast @ ~300 ms), all repeated queries of monCachedProcedures show that PlanID and CompileDate columns are not changing while the ExecutionCount column shows an ever increasing/incrementing value
  • you are using the same ASE version on the old (non-azure) instance and the new (azure) instance; or if using different ASE versions the differences are in the minor/subversions (ie, we're not comparing ASE 12.5.4 vs ASE 15, or ASE 15 vs ASE 16)

--------------------------

re: the lengthy 15-second run time for the 'initial' proc call

The initial lengthy proc call is likely related to an excessive (re)compile time, with subsequent calls being (relatively) fast due to not having to recompile the proc.

But why aren't you seeing this issue on the old (non-azure) instance?

Off the top of my head I'm guessing a difference in optimizer related configuration settings could be at play here with the primary culprit being optimization goal; consider:

  • allrows_oltp - enables the fewest optimizer features which in turn can mean the (re)compile phase is (relatively) fast
  • allrows_mix [default config] - enables a few more optimizer features (eg, merge joins) which in turn can mean the (re)compile phase takes longer (than allrows_oltp); with complicated, multi-table queries it's not uncommon to see the (re)compile phase take many seconds, or even minutes, to complete
  • allrows_dss - enables a few more optimizer features (eg, merge and hash joins) which in turn can mean the (re)compile phase may (still) take longer (than allrows_oltp) to complete; again, total (re)compile time will be based on the complexity of the query(s) in the proc

My best guess on what's happening:

  • the old (non-azure) instance is configured with optimization goal == allrows_oltp
  • the new (azure) instance is configured with optimization goal == allrows_mix (or allrows_dss)
  • the (re)compile process is occurring in both (non-azure, azure) instances but the faster allrows_oltp based (re)compilation is so (relatively) fast that users don't see any noticeable differences in proc speeds

While this could explain the proc calls that take 15 seconds it doesn't explain why all spids are are incurring a 15 second run time the first time each spid calls the proc; spids that find an available entry in procedure cache should not incur the 15 second delay.

FWIW:

  • To this day I still recommend clients configure their ASE instances to use optimization goal == allrows_oltp if simply because the extra compilation overhead of allrows_mix/allrows_dss is still quite excessive; for queries where merge and/or hash joins would be of benefit I recommend clients enable/disable connection level settings as needed or use abstract query plans.
  • It hasn't been mentioned (so far) in this Q&A so I'll throw out the (obvious) recommendation ... conduct a detailed comparison of the configuration settings (sp_configure) for both (non-azure, azure) instances to insure you're comparing apples to apples.

The next guess would be a change in the application's connection process and/or a change in an ASE login trigger/proc that's changing some compiler related configs at the connection level.  Short of doing some code reviews you could try running sp_options show, null, null, <spid> against processes running on both (non-azure, azure) instances to see if there are any differences in compiler settings at the connection levels.

--------------------------

A couple scenarios come to mind where #temp tables can wreak havoc on performance by forcing excessive (re)compile operations

  • (sp_configure) optimize temp table resolution is set to the default setting of 0/off (default): when set to 0/off the proc (re)compiles are based on the #temp table object id so multiple spids, creating the same #temp table (but with difference object ids) and then calling the same proc (that references the #temp table), will see recompiles due to the differences in #temp table object ids; when set to 1/on the proc recompiles are typically reduced, if not eliminated, because the differences in object ids are ignored; this should also apply for #temp tables created across multiple tempdbs
  • regardless of how optimize temp table resolution is configured you can still see proc recompiles if the different spids have #temp tables with the same name but a difference in the structure of the table, eg, different sets of columns, different order of columns (in the create table call), different datatypes, different indexes

One (obvious) problem with this idea (#temp table related recompilations) is it would not be limited to just the initial proc call (for a given spid); in other words, issues with #temp table related recompilations should be occurring quite frequently throughout the life of a connection/spid where multiple spids are (re)using the same entry from procedure cache

--------------------------

An additional idea that builds on the idea of proc recompilations based on #temp table structure changes and which could explain why the only recompilation occurs with a spid's initial proc call:

  • spid creates a #temp table with no indexes
  • spid calls proc (first time)
  • proc checks to see if the #temp table has a specific index; if the index does not exist the proc creates the index
  • the creation of the index is considered a change in the #temp table's structure so the proc is recompiled
  • proc completes and control is returned to the parent spid
  • at this point the #temp table has a new index
  • spid calls proc again
  • proc checks to see if the #temp table has a specific index; this index exists so no new index needs to be created which in turn means the #temp table's structure does not change which means the proc does not have to be recompiled
  • all other spids reusing this proc (from procedure cache) also already have the (new) index so no need to perform the create-index/change-table-structure/recompile-proc phase

A variation on this idea would see the conditional create index replaced with a conditional update statistics call.

--------------------------

You've mentioned in a comment the proc uses a global temporary table. I would expect a global temporary table to be treated more like a permanent table (as opposed to a #temp table) if simply because we're dealing with a single object id and a fixed structure; all I've got at this point are questions

  • are you using global temporary tables in the old (non-azure) instance
  • are you by any chance creating multiple global temporary tables (same name but in different tempdb databases)
  • is one instance using a single tempdb while the other instance is using multiple tempdbs

 

Assuming this isn't an issue with the optimization goal configuration, and there are no performance issues with global temporary tables in the old (non-azure) instance, but there are differences (code changes, introduction of multi-tempdb databases) in the new (azure) instance then I'd probably opt for opening a tech support case to see if there any known issues with your 'new' environment.

entry.title: Recording negative volumes for positive dollar amounts
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are trying to interface one system with S4 Hana, and one of the GL entries required to be posted is positive purchases with negative dollar amounts to the same GL account, how do we incorporate that?  

Do you suggest any kind of rule needs to be introduced in the interface for reading the data or do you think that separate STAT account should be created? Your wisdom and response is valued and appreciated.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: F1520 Proposed Posting Date Field during Reprocessing...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you read the restriction on the note itself, it clearly states:

  1. If there is provided a value for the posting date field in the bank statement during the import via the format mapping or manual creation, this value is proposed as the first option on the detail screen of a bank statement item.
  2. The first option as an alternative default value, the application proposes the value of the bank statement date in the posting date field on the detail screen of a bank statement item.
  3. When the item is edited and saved as a draft with a different value in the posting date field, this new value is kept and proposed instead of the bank statement date or another value from the bank statement format mapping within this field.

Have you followed this?

If yes and you saved the draft with a different value in the posting date field and it does not take it over, I would propose you open an incident.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

Regards,

Minh

My expectation is that at least the key from the associated field should be shown based on the following configuration.

Any thought on where this has gone wrong? I have tried a tonne of other things as well without any success.

entry.title: Re: In MD07 traffic siginal, What is definition of 1st Re...
entry.content: Thanks for your answer! 👍👍

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
@qmacro 

Hi DJ,  
I confess to being confused a little about the "service document" reference and how the "service document" is obtained. In this case we are working with REST and not OData, so the "service document" isn't the EDMX response returned by an OData service endpoint with $metadata appended. Is that what you meant by the service document?

The default cap "Welcome to @sap/cds Server" page shows the service endpoints, in my case, /rest/plain and clicking on this returns a JSON document containing an array of entities with no entries. The existence of functions is not described. If I add one entity to my CDS model, the JSON document contains an array of entities, with an entry for my newly added entity in the array, with attributes of name and url. The existence of functions is still not described. 

So what does cap offer that approximates the output of the OData $metadata response? cap does offer the ability to generate an EDMX description of a service defined in cap. I've found the command below useful to generate the EDMX description of the service plain:

cds srv -s plain -2 edmx

This edmx description describes both entities and functions (and types etc) , similar to that generated for OData services defined in cap.

entry.title: Live Session Introduction: Unleashing the Power of Composable Storefront Server Side Rendering
entry.content:
What is it about?

Join us for an enlightening live session where we unravel the intricacies of Server Side Rendering (SSR) and its pivotal role in optimizing Composable storefront. This session is designed to equip developers and tech enthusiasts with the foundational knowledge and advanced techniques necessary to harness the full potential of SSR. From understanding its significance to mastering setup and optimization, this comprehensive walkthrough will guide you through the key aspects of implementing and refining SSR in your projects. Whether you're a beginner or looking to deepen your expertise, this webinar will provide valuable insights and practical guidelines to enhance your Composable storefront development workflow.

Who is it for?

This live session is intended for Technical Consultants, Frontend Developers and Software Architects, who need to implement and optimize the composable storefront SSR.

What does it offer?

The live session is a 1.5 hours instructor led webinar via SAP live class (e.g. zoom). By the end of the session, you will gain a clear and detailed understanding of what Server Side Rendering (SSR) is and why it’s essential for composable storefronts, learn how to set up and run SSR with step-by-step instructions, discover best practices for optimizing SSR performance, reducing load times, and improving the overall user experience, get acquainted with standard SSR coding guidelines and avoid common pitfalls and equip yourself with the skills to troubleshoot common issues in SSR. Don’t miss this opportunity to elevate your technical skills and improve the performance of your composable storefront application!

The essential topics are:

  • Introduction to SSR
  • Setting Up and Running SSR
  • SSR Optimization Options/Techniques
  • SSR Coding Guidelines
  • SSR Transfer State
  • SSR Logging and Troubleshooting

plus

  • Code Walkthrough & Live Demos
  • Questions & Answers

How can you book it?

The live sessions are available for the EMEA/NA/APJ regions on SAP Learning Site. You will need to have a subscription in order to register for the live session there.

To access the registration page of this live session (as well as the schedule of the next occurrences

  • You can follow the direct link here, but please remember you need to be logged in on SAP Learning Site first to use the link: Live Session: Unleashing the Power of Composable Storefront Server Side Rendering

Please Note

For a better understanding the live session’s content, it’s recommended to also checkout the following learning resources:

  • Composable Storefront Microlearning videos
  • Composable Storefront C4H370 ILT training
  • Hands-on Practice for Composable Storefront Developer Training
  • Composable Storefront Help Documentation

before or after attending the live session.

Last But Not Least

If you want to know more or get informed with the update of the live session, please follow the blog post by clicking on the “follow” button on the left.

Thank you for reading! Have a good day and see you next!

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: OData Connector for PowerBi
entry.content:
Hi @solman_solman2,

I still lack a bit of information to identify if the connection closing was on the client or server side. Do you have some details on the error?

entry.title: payment difference posted to an expense account as required, but produced unexpected tax amount
entry.content:
hi experts

I have an issue about payment difference posting. There is some mini difference between invoice and payment. we take it as a financial profit/loss in our accounting requirement. I have configed the tolerence limit and corresponding GL account. 

but when I simulated the General ledger in F-53, the expense amount has automatically calcualted the tax amount which derived the tax code from invoice.

 

 

 

 

 

what I wanto the payment booking should be:

Dr: AP     amount - 8000

Dr:  bank charge expense amount - 10

Cr: bank account 8010

I want to know, is there any way to removal the automatic derive of the tax code/not including tax amount?

thanks a lot, guys!

entry.title: Re: Unable to Start HTTPS on 443
entry.content:
Please refer to note 421359.

1. Increase file icmbnd permissions
2. Add extbind=1 to icm/server_port_XX

entry.title: Re: Streams in RAP : Uploading PDF , Excel and Other Files in RAP Application
entry.content:
@DaviCastro 

Hi DaviCastro :

   Thanks for your reply.
   There are my attachment defi. Is there something wrong？

mimetype and filename : char128   checked Case-sensitive

 

root entity

projection

extension

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle: Driving Business Transformation at SAP Sapphire 2024
entry.content:
SAP Sapphire 2024 marked a pivotal year for SAP, demonstrating its steadfast commitment to driving intelligent enterprise transformation. SAP CEO Christian Klein set the tone at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando and Barcelona by emphasizing the integration of Business AI across SAP’s expansive suite of solutions and services.

At the heart of these advancements lies SAP Cloud ALM a key enabler in our mission to help you achieve "clean core" while embracing a holistic approach to managing your digital landscape. Let's dive into how SAP Cloud ALM is powering the future of business transformation.

 RISE with SAP powered by Comprehensive Transformation Toolkit

We've significantly expanded our RISE with SAP offering to include powerful tools like SAP Cloud ALM, SAP LeanIX, SAP Signavio, and Tricentis Test Automation for SAP. This enhanced ecosystem empowers you to manage your processes, systems, and data landscapes more effectively than ever before.

SAP Cloud ALM stands out as a cornerstone of our clean core strategy. By simplifying the implementation process, it reduces the complexity of deploying SAP solutions, offering comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities that enhance visibility, control, and agility. For businesses navigating the challenges of digital transformation, SAP Cloud ALM is an indispensable ally.

 Real-World Success Stories

At Sapphire 2024, we were proud to showcase how our solutions are making a real difference for businesses across industries:

  • PureTech Scientific deployed SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition in just 15 weeks using SAP Cloud ALM, demonstrating the power of rapid transformation.
  • Tropicana Brands Group leveraged RISE with SAP to complete an IT separation and transformation within a year, focusing on agility and a unified business architecture.
  • Fresenius SE successfully migrated 29 system landscapes to RISE with SAP, simplifying their infrastructure and overcoming regulatory challenges.
  • Hitachi HighTech Corporation significantly reduced custom addons, enabling faster upgrades and integration of new technologies like AI and process automation.

These stories underscore the tangible benefits of our cloud solutions and the transformative power of a clean core approach along with powerful tools like SAP Cloud ALM, SAP LeanIX, SAP Signavio, and Tricentis Test Automation for SAP.

 Your Path to Seamless Transformation

Our integrated approach provides you with a seamless end-to-end toolchain. This comprehensive suite accelerates innovation and value realization, positioning your business to achieve new levels of operational excellence and competitive advantage.

 Conclusion: SAP Cloud ALM at the Heart of Your Transformation 

SAP Cloud ALM has emerged as a central pillar in our strategy for intelligent enterprise transformation. Its role in reducing complexity, enhancing visibility, and maintaining a clean core is crucial in enabling frictionless operations for your business.

As we move forward from SAP Sapphire 2024, we're excited to continue partnering with you on your transformation journey. With SAP Cloud ALM and our comprehensive suite of solutions, you're equipped to navigate the complexities of digital transformation with unprecedented agility and precision.

Watch Marc Thier, Tim Steuer, and Evan Stoddard as they outline.

Optimizing innovation: road map for SAP Cloud ALM 

This blog post was created with the invaluable assistance of Sonal Kumar and Tim Steuer, who provided essential editing and guidance.

entry.title: Re: ME54N (Message no. MEPO822 )
entry.content: I had a similar case and it was that the applicant was different.

entry.title: 通过创建日记账分录接口输入特别总账标识A无效，创建的日记账分录无法带出预付款
Re: Posting Journal Entries with Tax Using SOAP Posting APIs
entry.content:
Hi Steve,

You can submit a request via Customer Influence for an enhancement suggestion. We have dedicated roles to hear customer voice and evaluate the request. For more information:

https://www.sap.com/about/customer-involvement/influence-adopt.html

Best,

Alice

entry.title: Re: S4HC CDS view on Supplier that I can filter on Industry
entry.content: I have found my solution.   The industries that I set on my Supplier Master record can be seen in the CDS view I_BusinessPartnerIndustry.   (I also had to create a custom CDS view of that to see the content)

entry.title: Re: Streams in RAP : Uploading PDF , Excel and Other Files in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hi @ggreekn72, have you correctly defined the draft behaviors?

Have you correctly defined the draft behaviors? I created a repository on github at the link UploadFileWithAnnotationsRAP , you can take a look at the behavior in the same repository or at the link Behavior , the description of the repository is in Brazilian Portuguese.

In some cases, v2 may not work due to the version of fiori/sapui5, however, in a client I worked with that had this limitation, I was able to carry out the same treatment but manually, creating an extension in the application, I also created a repository with all the coding in the link UploadFileWithSectionExtensionRAP , I hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Great post and thanks for sharing below great news: "Great news from SAP Sappire 2024. SAP Business AI Innovations and Collaborations with Partners including Google Cloud, Meta, Microsoft..."

A question to expert @YatseaLi : what's the evaluation and approval process of adding a new LLM to AI Core, any idea? If we want to recommend some good LLMs to add to AI Core, do you know which team to contact, or what process can we follow? Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: Value in LC equal zero when selecting the special stock and movement type 601 in transaction MB
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Value in LC equal zero when selecting the special sto...
entry.content: Hi, it is possible that the movement was posted as non-valuated. The special stocks are valuated different than the normal stock. For detailed information please check KBA 1915998 - "Valuation of a Movement when Special Stock E/Q is involved."

entry.title: Re: 通过创建日记账分录接口输入特别总账标识A无效，创建的日记账分录无法带出预付款
entry.content:
在S/4HANA Cloud上，使用API只能创建客户或者供应商的预付款申请，然后在走预付款流程。详情可以参见如下几篇博客

浅析API日记账分录-过账可以实现的场景-技术篇：应付账款(二) 供应商预付款申请

浅析API日记账分录-过账可以实现的场景-业务篇：应付账款（二）供应商预付款申请

浅析API日记账分录-过账可以实现的场景-业务篇：应收账款（二）客户预付款申请

浅析API日记账分录-过账可以实现的场景-技术篇：应收账款(二) 客户预付款申请

entry.content:
Check this article, you need to change the FM you're using for Upload

https://www.samplecodeabap.com/how-to-upload-excel-to-sapusing-abap/

entry.title: Код рекомендації Bybit "BET1000": максимізуйте свою криптовалютну торгівлю у 2024 році
entry.content: Розблокуйте найкращі пропозиції Bybit за допомогою реферального коду "BET1000". Отримайте бонус до 30 000 доларів США та знижку 10% на комісію за торгівлю протягом першого місяця. Крім того, отримайте акцію в розмірі 25 доларів США лише за реєстрацію.Пояснення реферального коду Bybit Код рекомендації Bybit «BET1000» — це ваш вихід на платформу криптовалютної торгівлі Bybit. Він надає безкоштовні бонуси за реєстрацію та знижки для нових користувачів. Як використовувати байт-код "BET1000"? Зареєструйтеся на веб-сайті або в додатку Bybit Під час реєстрації введіть промокод Bybit "BET1000". Підтвердьте електронну адресу або мобільний телефон Депозити крипто Вимагайте винагороди в Rewards Hub Етапи реєстрації Відвідайте сторінку реєстрації Bybit Введіть код запрошення Bybit "BET1000" Повна реєстрація Зробіть депозит Почніть торгувати Отримайте доступ до бонусів у Rewards Hub протягом 14 днівЦей посібник містить ключову інформацію про реферальну програму Bybit. Використовуйте бонусний код Bybit BET1000, щоб максимізувати свій потенціал криптовалютної торгівлі. Почніть зараз і насолоджуйтесь зниженими комісіями та значними бонусами на надійній торговій платформі Bybit.

entry.title: Re: Displaying data using SAP BTP Destination REST API In...
entry.content: You're right. The data definitely returning too much data and need to be filtered.

entry.title: How to manage obsolete organisational units in learning module
entry.content:
We have a business need to be able to see, and easily interpret the current organisational(org) units (against active employees) and their structure in the learning module. We use the org unit connector (in learning administration) to import the organisational units. We don’t use Employee Central.

What we have found is that connector only works one way. Making org unit’s active. It never deletes them. Thus, we have a build-up of org units that are no longer active, and we can't clearly make out the org units with active employees against them.

Note: The inactive org units are still used against inactive employee’s details. They are essentially frozen in time. 

When we search the org structure in Learning Admin>People>Org Units>Search, we find there is a lot of obsolete data. After a number of mergers we have over 8000 Organizational Units in the Organisational Unit Connector, and 3500 of those are no longer in use.

My understanding is we can only delete an organisational unit (not archive). We can only delete an org unit in the system if there are no employees against the org unit. And deleting an org unit has to be done manually- one by one. There is no bulk action.

Do any other organisations have this issue? And if so, how do they overcome it?

entry.title: GenAI Reference Solution Architecture on SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Introduction

In a remarkably short span, GenAI has taken the world by storm. With the help of Large Language Models (LLMs) we can tap boundless opportunities for everyone. Enterprises globally can harness the power of GenAI to innovate and streamline their processes like never before.

SAP is at the forefront of this revolution, making substantial investments in GenAI. With its robust, enterprise-ready Business Technology Platform (BTP), it enables the creation of GenAI solutions that seamlessly integrate with both SAP and non-SAP cloud services and customer's S/4 HANA ERP system.

In this blog, I present a solution architecture for a side-by-side extension that not only integrates seamlessly with S/4 HANA but also leverages the cutting-edge Generative AI services on the Business Technology Platform. Discover how this powerful combination can transform your enterprise, driving efficiency and unlocking new possibilities for growth and innovation.

I will structure this blog in 2 sections.

  1. Architectural Blueprint: A detailed architecture diagram illustrating the design.
  2. Component Breakdown: In-depth explanations of each component, highlighting it's importance and benefits in the architecture.

Let's get started. 

 

Architectural Blueprint

The following diagram presents an architectural blueprint for GenAI solution or S/4 HANA extension, developed and deployed on BTP. This architecture ensures seamless integration with on-premise S/4 HANA through connectivity service and leverages hyperscaler LLMs via the Generative AI Hub to unlock AI capabilities. 

Architecture Diagram

 

Let's deep dive into each component.

 

Component Breakdown

In this section, we'll take an in-depth look at each component. Understanding these components and their responsibility will provide a comprehensive view of how they collectively contribute to the solution.

Business Technology Platform (BTP):

This is the platform for creating an Intelligent Enterprise. It is an integrated offering comprising of database, application development, integration and intelligent technologies like GenAI. As you can see in the architecture diagram, you can create and integrate your solution completely leveraging cloud services on BTP. As you can see some of the many services leveraged in the architecture as listed below

  1. HANA Cloud database
  2. Generative AI Hub
  3. Cloud Foundry Runtime
  4. SAP Build Work Zone
  5. Connectivity service

We will be going in details of each one of it in the following sections.

HANA Cloud Database:

SAP HANA Cloud is SAP’s database-as-a-service offering, giving you the power and performance of SAP HANA in the cloud. The SAP HANA Cloud allows you to consume the SAP HANA database from applications running on SAP Business Technology Platform.

SAP HANA Cloud vector engine provides capability to create relevant and responsible GenAI solutions. Recent advances in GenAI and Large Language Models has generated importance for a reliable vector databases. Similarity search complements relational database and full-text search systems. Embedding functions map natural language text to high-dimensional vectors. Since LLM data can lead to hallucinations, vector databases can complement LLM responses with additional relevant text through Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). Leveraging vector database like SAP HANA Cloud can ensure response quality from LLM.

Generative AI Hub:

Generative AI Hub provides you access to diverse set of LLMs which can be integrated with your solution on SAP BTP in a cost effective way. It gives access to SAP foundational models and open source models. In the architecture diagram, I have considered Azure OpenAI LLMs which are described in brief below

  1. gpt-4o-turbo: Useful for generating relevant response for applications based on prompt and content. Assisting language translations and summarization.
  2. text-embeddings-ada-002: For creating embeddings for the content or summary. Used for clustering similar text together. The embeddings are stored in vector database which can be referred at later point of time.

Cloud Foundry Runtime:

Cloud foundry run time helps you develop and run cloud native solutions. It is built on open standards where developers can choose language of their choice. For example - Node.js, JAVA or Python.

You can create applications leveraging CAP (Cloud Application Programming) model and access underlying custom tables in HANA cloud database using declarative programming paradigm with CDS (Core Data Services). I have showcased a full stack CAP application deployed on cloud foundry runtime.

It also provides Python build packs for creating AI driven microservices. In the architecture diagram, you can see the Python microservice is integrating with LLMs using python libraries (generative-ai-hub-sdk & ai-core-sdk). Using opensource library like Langchain, you can seamlessly integrate with vector engine in SAP HANA Cloud. These python libraries are available to install from python packaging index (PyPi).

SAP Business Application Studio provides support for development for all the above mentioned languages to ease the development process.

SAP Build Work Zone: 

SAP Build Work Zone enables organizations to establish a centralized point of access to SA custom-built, and third party applications and extensions. As shown in the Architecture diagram, the free style UI5 CAP application is integrated in the SAP Build work zone, from where it can be accessed based on roles configured for the user.

Connectivity Service:

SAP BTP Connectivity service enables cloud applications deployed on BTP to securely access remote services on the Internet or on-premise. It allows configuration of application connections via destinations and facilitates connections to on-premise systems using the Cloud Connector. This component also establishes a secure tunnel with your on-premise network so your applications can communicate with on premise systems securely with trust.

As shown in the architecture diagram, CAP service integrates with S/4 HANA APIs (On Premise) securely through cloud connector which is configured on the customer premises. CAP service integrates with other cloud applications via destinations configured in the connectivity service.

 

Conclusion

To conclude, the integration of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) with advanced Generative AI (GenAI) and Large Language Models (LLMs) offer countless opportunities for enterprises to scale efficiently. By leveraging the robust capabilities of vector databases and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), businesses can significantly enhance the accuracy and quality of AI-driven solutions.

The architectural blueprint provided in this blog demonstrates how seamless integration with on-premise S/4 HANA systems and the utilization of hyperscaler LLMs through the Generative AI Hub can be achieved leveraging cloud services to create side by side extension on BTP thus following the "Clean Core" approach.

Note: The content in this blog is based on my experience working on SAP BTP and creating AI solutions on BTP.

To get more updates about this topic, please follow the below pages

  1. SAP Business Technology Platform 
  2. Generative AI Hub
  3. generative-ai-hub-sdk
  4. Learning Journeys

Feel free to “like“, “Share“, “Add a Comment” and to get more updates about my next blogs follow me – avinash.vaidya@sap.com

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports Print ActiveX Control Buffer Overflow Vulnerability-2
entry.content:
We are currently using Crystal Reports 2008 version 12.3.0.601 and is no longer in active development.

This version contains the below risks

CVE-2010-2567: This vulnerability is a buffer overflow issue in the Print ActiveX Control, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted input.

CVE-2010-2590: This vulnerability is related to improper input validation in the Print ActiveX Control, also allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code.

We need to know from SAP and check if these vulnerabilities have actually been addressed (I doubt)

entry.title: Re: Where can I find cleanOAuthRefreshTokenCronJob? Does...
entry.content:
Hi @geffchang 

It's in the latest Commerce Cloud 2211 version. 

You can find the Impex scripts at hybris/bin/platform/ext/oauth2/resources/impex/essentialdata-cleanup-oauthrefreshtoken.impex, and the Job implementation at hybris/bin/platform/ext/oauth2/resources/oauth2-spring.xml. 

Here are the screenshot taken from my Commerce Cloud 2211 instance. 

CronJob item 

Job item 

Hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Program not available in Advance Financial Close
entry.content:
Hi @pradi9dhawale,

You have mentioned task model but I'm referring to the task list model. Please have a look at this documentation for task list model How to Define Task List Models | SAP Help Portal. 

I am guessing here that you haven't assigned the task model to the task list model. Please refer to this link How to Assign Task Models to Task List Models | SAP Help Portal.

Once you have reviewed your settings and confirmed they are properly maintained, please run the synchronization and confirm in AFC. 

Regards,
Darrel

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Submitted the task.

Regarding the service document for odata and rest services :- So the service document provides metadata about the exposed services, including the available entities, their properties, actions, and functions. In odata we access it at '/$metadata' endpoint & I don't see such service document for rest protocol exposed services. I feel it's more like interacting with the service(rest) directly via RESTful endpoints.

entry.title: Re: R47 Delete ABAP Session after Error
entry.content:
Hi

There's nothing in dispatcher trace (dev_disp) except for the below message for work process. These messages keep coming for all WP. PFA

DpHdlDeadWp: W29 (pid=7084) terminated automatically
DpWpDynCreate: created new work process W29-8238

Thanks,
Subasri

entry.title: Attribute permissions exported to Production Tenant, didn't transfer the users assigned to it.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Issue: I have transported Attribute permissions, Permission Filters and Business roles. But I see the users assigned to it are not transitioned to production tenant. Viz. Users assigned is 0 to each of these.

Expectation: All the Security elements mentioned above should have the same number of business users assigned as in Dev/Test Tenant. Viz. All the business users' assignments should get transported in Production Tenant.

Note: I have maintained all Employees and Business Users in Production Tenant but not assigned them to permissions / roles. I am expecting it to happen automatically when I import permissions /roles.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Bybit Referans Kodu "BET1000": 2024'te Kripto Ticaretinizi En Üst Düzeye Çıkarın
entry.content: "BET1000" referans koduyla Bybit'in en iyi tekliflerinin kilidini açın. İlk ayınız için 30.000 USDT'ye kadar bonus ve işlem ücretlerinde %10 indirim kazanın. Ayrıca, yalnızca kaydolduğunuz için 25 ABD doları değerinde USDT promosyonundan yararlanın.Bybit Referans Kodu Açıklaması: Bybit Referans Kodu "BET1000", Bybit'in kripto ticaret platformuna açılan kapınızdır. Yeni kullanıcılara ücretsiz kayıt bonusları ve ücret indirimleri sağlar.Bybit Kodu "BET1000" Nasıl Kullanılır? Bybit web sitesine veya uygulamasına kaydolun Kayıt sırasında Bybit promosyon kodunu "BET1000" girin E-postayı veya cep telefonunu doğrulayın Kripto yatır "Ödül Merkezi"nde ödülleri talep edin Kayıt Adımları Bybit Kayıt Bonusu: Bybit kayıt sayfasını ziyaret edin Bybit davet kodunu girin "BET1000" Kaydı tamamla Mevduat yapmak Ticarete başla Rewards Hub'daki bonuslara 14 gün içinde erişinBu kılavuz Bybit'in yönlendirme programı hakkında önemli bilgiler sağlar. Kripto ticareti potansiyelinizi en üst düzeye çıkarmak için Bybit bonus kodunu BET1000 kullanın. Şimdi başlayın ve Bybit'in sağlam ticaret platformunda indirimli ücretlerin ve önemli bonusların keyfini çıkarın.

entry.title: HOUSE BANK
entry.content:
Hi expert, help me to answer this:

Which information is part of the Bank Master Data?        

There are 2 correct answers to this question.      

1. Address details

2. Control data

3. Data Medium Exchange (DME) details

4. Information for electronic payment transactions

entry.title: Workflow delegation
entry.content:
Hi All

We have a situation where Manager A is on leave and has auto delegation to Manager B via the quick tile feature on the home page. However now Manager B is on leave and has his delegation set to Manager C. 

We are expecting Manager A's workflow to be delegated to Manager C. Is that possible? 

 

Shan

entry.title: Re: How can I export a ttf file or font file from sap?

Dear Customer,

HELVE font can't be downloaded from SAP system.

I can see there are some websites where you can download this font.
But I'm not sure if it requires license.You can take a try.

Best Regards

Jie
SAP Support

Hello,

console.log(selections);

console.log(member);

console.log(prop);

console.log(dateparam);

Put these lines bevore the line with setdimensionfilter. Then, go in Devtool (F12) and give a printscreen of what the console.log returns in the Information register of the console

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: ABAP Test Cockpit in the Cloud - What is already possible
entry.content:
Dear Olga,

currently we use a OnPremise system S4HANA2021 as a central ATC System (SAP_BASIS 756/SP2).

How can I migrate my existing data (Baseline data, exemption requests, etc.) to SAP BTP?

Which features are still missing on a SAP BTP system?
(baseline concept, integration with SolMan tools, developer scenario, end-to-end exemption handling...).

What's  the  roadmap of missing features?

Kind Regards

Frank

entry.title: Re: How to restrict users from accessing B1_SHF Attachment
entry.content: Actually if user is using SAP B1 client in local network on HANA environment where they can attach the document but should not have acces to the folder as they may manuaaly access the folder and delete the files.

entry.title: Re: In MD07 traffic siginal, What is definition of 1st Re...
entry.content:
Hi,

This is where you use the parameters for days' supply, receipt days' supply 1, and receipt days' supply 2 to define the conditions under which materials are indicated by red, yellow, and green traffic lights in the MRP list.

For example:

  • When days' supply <= 0, the traffic light for a material should be red.
  • When days' supply is > 0 and <= 10 days, the traffic light should be yellow.
  • When days' supply is > 10 days, the traffic light should be green.

You can define the following:

  • Red: Days' supply <= 0
  • Yellow: Days' supply > 0 and <= 10
  • Green: Days' supply > 10

The standard, predefined value for the green traffic light is 999.9. Therefore, any setting for the yellow traffic light (> 10 days in the example) will automatically result in a green traffic light.

The settings for receipt days' supplies are analogous to the settings for days' supply.

The traffic light is set after considering the settings for all ranges of coverage and all exception groups.

For example: If a material has a days' supply of 12 days, a green traffic light would be set according to the above settings. However, if an exception from exception group 4 exists, and exception group 4 is indicated in red, the material will be given a red traffic light.

Regards

entry.title: Re: payment difference posted to an expense account as re...
entry.content:
Hi @emmayoung 

The below OSS Note explains the behaviour:

2142852 - Minor payment difference posting with tax code - SAP for Me

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: eInvoice Email-Process - Process Status is stuck on "...
entry.content:
Dear @Uwe_K,
thank you again for taking the time to help. I have tried to implement the Authentication you have recommended via certificates as descriped here: Konnektivität einrichten | SAP Help Portal. But i am facing the following issue now. I have to upload a certificate in the Destination (under Step 3 on the linked SAP Help articel) and im not sure how to get this certificate. 
I tried using the Client-Certificate which i downloaded in the Communicationagreement app under "outgoing communication" but it has the wrong format, as i need a pfx. file (private key included) (Uploading a Client Certificate for the Cloud Edition | SAP Help Portal) and i can only get a .pem file. My second try was using the Certificate i can download from the "Managing Client Certificates" app but there i can only get a .crt or a .pem file. So which certificate is the correct one and how do i get it in the .pfx format  ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Re: Data source Inspection analysis becomes inconsistent...
entry.content: So no solution?

entry.title: Re: Adobe form with RAP Based OData Service
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing your post! @SachinArtani 

I followed the steps in your post on my SAP Public Cloud. I have already created a service definition named 'ZSAC_UI_PURCHASE_ORDER' and binding the service with the type OData V2 Web API named 'ZSAC_API_PURCHASE_ORDER_O2'.

Afterwards, I accessed the 'Maintain Form Templates' app to change the 'Data Source' value to the prefix 'ZSAC_'. However, I couldn't find any 'ZSAC_*' values available, as shown in the image.

Could you please advise if I might be missing a step? I am unsure if this issue is related to any annotations or if I need to release any API state. 

Thank you in advance. 😀

entry.title: Need to upgrade SAP ASE from v16 SP04 PL04 to v16 SP04 PL06
entry.content:
Could someone please let me know if the above mentioned upgrade would require a fresh installation? Or is it just a matter of running a command? 

Please share any links or documentation.

entry.title: Re: No check on foreign key in ADT-defined database table
entry.content:
DDIC foreign keys are not considered in ABAP SQL.

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenddic_database_tables_forkeyrel.htm

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content: Great stuff! To your question "Is this a reference to CSN?" - what are you referring to with "this"?

entry.title: Re: sap.fe.macros.Field - How do i get the base control (e.g: sap.m.Input)
entry.content:
Hello smok1,

When the error was introduced following a value help / annotation validation, the expectation is that the user has to go in and manipulate the data to fix this.

UI5 models have a very deep integration with the error management / value state so the only way to resolve this is through the model as well.

Accessing the inner control is not something that we recommend / that we offer. Depending on the situation, the inner control may change, and we don't want to encourage code that relies on the internal structure.

What you should be able to try however is to use the `setValue` method to reset the value to `null|undefined`

entry.title: Re: How to Mass Import Worker Data for Concurrent Employm...
entry.content:
Hello Valeska . 

Manage Workforce app allows users to create and update workers, including work agreements and employment situations. you can create and update workers (employees and contingent workers), including work agreements, and change employment situations.

By creating migration templates and using predefined data models, you can efficiently import worker data for concurrent employment into SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Additionally, SAP provides documentation and support for data migration processes in the S/4HANA Cloud environment.

BAdIs for Workforce Person Replication business logic during the integration of workforce person data into SAP S/4HANA Cloud, BAdIs are made available that you can use these BAdIs to adapt or modify inbound workforce person data, filter out segments of data that aren’t required, and derive data for properties that cannot be filled from the source system.

BAdIs for inbound replication is applicable only if you want to replicate workforce persons using the Manage Workforce app. You can also use this BAdI to implement  replication errors.

You can find them in the Custom Logic app under the business contexts Workforce Assignment and Workforce Assignment Details.

In addition you can automation using SAP Build Process Automation Starter Pack
You can use SAP Build Process Automation to Create and augment automatically import of data and create the logic to handle exceptions during automation.

 

Hope it helps.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Next time "Just Ask": Simplifying Data Exploration - Configuration using a standard AB
entry.content:
@surstad - Thanks. Live connection support for Datasphere is available and it will be further enhanced in the future releases.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: sap.fe.macros.Field - How do i get the base control (...
entry.content: @nicolas_lunet I've already tried setValue to '' or null (I'm assuming on the fe.macros.Field control itself) and it's not working either.

entry.title: Re: sap.fe.macros.Field - How do i get the base control (...
entry.content: Weird, I just did the following on this page

entry.title: Re: sap.fe.macros.Field - How do i get the base control (...
entry.content:
Weird,

 

I just did the following on this page https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/field/fieldEdit

Type 444 in Dynamic Field Control (Path Based) -> UI turns red

sap.ui.getCore().byId("sap.fe.core.fpmExplorer.fieldEdit::Default--FieldControlValue").setValue(0) -> all good again

Make sure you are on the FieldAPI when doing so 🙂

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Business One version 10.0 compatible with Wind...
entry.content:
Hi,

If I am not mistaken it is not officially compatible with Windows 7. However, that only means that SAP has not tested this scenario, and as you have proved, it works.

The question is, did you mean that you installed the entire system on Windows 7, or only the client?

In case you installed the entire system on Windows 7, it may cause performance problems, and you can probably only use it with a single user, because Windows 7 is not a server operating system.

If you meant the client only, then if you run into problems, SAP may decide not to support you. However, probems with the client are usually handled by your SAP Partner, and they will probably help you anyway.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Well done for digging in and playing around, this is how we learn stuff, right? 

Remember that there's a difference between the service document and the metadata document for an OData service. The service document is at the root of the service URL, and the metadata document is at /$metadata, as mentioned in this thread. 

What I was directing folks towards was the difference between the service document when served with the OData protocol vs when served via the "REST" protocol. Try that and see what you get.

Regarding what you did (compile to EDMX), this is also nicely illustrative and we learn from that too. 

With `cds compile --to edmx` we're asking for (services and entities contained therein) in the CDS model to be compiled and emitted in an EDMX representation. This is arguably independent of how we eventually ask for the services to be, well, served (via the @protocol annotation). So regardless of whether you have e.g. @rest or @odata, the EDMX will be the same, because the services, and actions/functions/entities are the same.

entry.title: Re: sap.fe.macros.Field - How do i get the base control (...
entry.content:
@nicolas_lunet I'm working on an actual live odata V4 model. Will try again tonight and will let you know as I tried it yesterday.

This is with an updateGroupID set, so it doesn't go to the backend straightaway.

entry.title: Re: Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not...
entry.content:
Hi @Ajinkyak2 

Please check if material master already has a profit center and Profit center is at least an optional field in the field status for the GL Account as well as the posting keys used.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content: That's right. But (as I'm sure you know), there's something missing, when compared to the same "document" when served via the OData protocol. What is that?

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content: Excellent stuff!

entry.title: How to do a select before selection screen dsiplayed?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to do a select before selection screen is displayed.
I need to get a value and set it as default in one of the selection-screen parametrs ( select- option ) ?

entry.title: Re: CIM - GR number matching instead of PO number
entry.content:
At the moment only the old process using the S/4 backend processing is able to use Delivery Notes as references. The new matching process within SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management currently only handles purchase orders or purchase order items. 

The support for delivery notes and service entry sheet IDs should be added later.

entry.title: I want to understand how the Batch Job change logs can be pulled from SAP .
entry.content: TBTCP and TBTCO are not helping with what has been changed in the Job .  I want to see the logs of Job definition changes or frequency changes of Batch Jobs . Also want to understand if there is any system limitation on Batch Jobs change logs information extraction ?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud use of shared e-mail addresses
entry.content:
Dear all,

Is it possible to use a shared email address in SAP s/4hana cloud?

If possible, are there any precautions?

thanks in advance

entry.title: Ariba Sender Adapter in Cloud Integration not fetching Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a requirement to integrate Ariba supplier portal with SAP via Cloud Integration. There are 2 scenarios

1. Fetch orders from Ariba supplier portal and send to SAP ECC
2. Post invoices from SAP ECC to Ariba Supplier portal

We are using Ariba adapter in both the scenarios.

For posting invoices, I am able to do that using Ariba receiver adapter and invoice is reflecting in Ariba supplier portal. But while fetching orders using Ariba sender adapter, the iFlow is in Completed status but no orders are being pulled and there is no error in Message Monitoring.

I would like to know if anyone has used Ariba sender adapter to pull Purchase orders from Ariba portal and faced similar issue.

Thank you
Lekshmi

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Flexible Column Web View Second Column is not...
entry.content: @sk_ramkumar This looks a bug to me. I have reported it internally, will update here once I hear back.

entry.title: How to cancel / reverse the picked quantity from the pick list SAP Business one
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to cancel / reverse the picked quantity from the pick list SAP Business one?  

Or suggest the other workaround for same.

 

kind regards,

Nikunj
